snapshot.scope: Manual review binds public/documentation surfaces, control manifests, verifier code and shared executable schemas; automated gates execute current implementation evidence separately.

reviewers.task: Post-Backup Home and Models status ownership exact-hash review
reviewers.independence: UI Design independently reproduced exact e4044cb2 patch and efc86cef content hashes, eleven-path/index/diff identity, six-locale and compact/expanded behavior, accessibility, and Backup/Restore non-regression. It returned ACCEPTED/CLEAR without edits.

dimensions.summary: Existing Home, onboarding, Models and Pi owner sections locate one status/error owner without a new page, prototype, schema or setting.
Owners agree on no-source conversation ownership, source-row retention, filter-before-cap, durable Home reread, sequenced Models refresh, body-free errors and no Vault leakage.
Three exact selectors update only PIGE-UI-003, PIGE-PI-004 and existing partial E1.02/E1.13/E3.01 projections; semantic lock v3 has 1,192 claims and all statuses remain unchanged.
Development gets one executable contract for missing-model ownership, filtered Recent Work, returning-Home truth, Models-local recovery and stale-result suppression.
No Markdown file or decision is added; replacement wording and JSON compression keep all leanness gates green without raising any budget.

verification.evidence: The exact eleven-path Development plus six-path governed candidate passes docs, decisions, UI, independent review, TRC-001 through TRC-005, CON-001 through CON-004, dependencies, fixtures, boundaries, no telemetry, source artifacts, LEN-001 through LEN-005 and all quality dimensions.

verification.command: Exact candidate test, package and distribution evidence
verification.evidence: Focused 6/111, full 104/1,191, typecheck/build and unified Agent pass. The 160,602,371-byte macOS ZIP passes packaged and independent distribution smoke with strict ad-hoc integrity.

verification.command: npm run verify:dependencies && npm run verify:traceability && npm run verify:contracts
verification.evidence: The candidate retains 57 dependency records with zero waivers; CON-001 through CON-004 and semantic lock v3/1,192 pass with no Requirement, Exit or phase status drift.
LEN-001 through LEN-005 pass with 56 Markdown files, 3,466 entry words, 4,340 trace lines, 249,414 trace bytes and 1,212,942 governed Markdown bytes.

coordination.taskTitle: Post-Backup Home and Models status ownership
coordination.compatibility: This candidate gives Home and Models one truthful status/error owner while preserving Backup/Restore, provider protocol, IPC, durable data, dependencies and all statuses.
coordination.acknowledgement: Development froze exact eleven-path bytes and evidence. UI Design returned exact-hash ACCEPTED/CLEAR. Product Planning synchronized three existing owners, acceptance, semantic lock and this current-only recipe without changing Development files.

nonBlockingRisks: Broader Provider catalog, tray, general polish and remaining Production Ready flows stay open.
Signed installed-platform and wider manual locale/accessibility matrices remain open.
Backup/Restore, provider protocol, public IPC, durable data, permissions and dependencies are unchanged.
